dashboard.label: Model Usage And Telemetry
dashboard.description: Runtime OpenClaw and DefenseClaw usage, OTLP ingest, latency, and trace activity from local HEC events.

html.p: This page uses runtime events from the running DefenseClaw/OpenClaw instance. Local Splunk receives HEC audit summaries and extracted usage metrics; full raw OTel spans and metrics are exported through the Splunk OTel Collector path.

panel.title: Trace ingest events in last 24 hours
Runtime metric signals by provider and model

search.query: `openclaw_metrics_base` | stats max(metric_value) as total_value count as events values(unit) as units values(token_type) as token_types by metric_name provider model | sort - total_value | head 20

panel.title: Run duration and queue wait by provider and model

search.query: `openclaw_duration_metrics` | stats avg(metric_value) as avg_metric_value max(metric_value) as max_metric_value by metric_name provider model | sort - max_metric_value | head 20
`openclaw_queue_pressure_metrics` | stats max(metric_value) as max_metric_value values(unit) as units by metric_name run_id session_id | sort - max_metric_value | head 20
`openclaw_usage_traces` | table timestamp span_name trace_id span_id run_id session_id duration_ms provider model status | sort - timestamp | head 20
`openclaw_metrics_base` | table timestamp metric_name metric_value unit provider model run_id session_id session_key component status | sort - timestamp | head 20
`openclaw_usage_traces` | stats count avg(duration_ms) as avg_duration_ms max(duration_ms) as max_duration_ms by span_name status | sort - count | head 20
